narrative:
Pataskala 1-B (precinct in Licking County) has 2,416 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
